nasb.text: Then Herod secretly called the magi and determined from them the exact time the star appeared.

esv.text: Then Herod summoned the wise men secretly and ascertained from them what time the star had appeared.

cnv.text: 希律暗中把星象家召來，仔細查問他們，那顆星甚麼時候出現，

ccb.text: 于是，希律暗中召见那几位智者，仔细查问那星出现的准确时间，

csbs.text: 于是，希律暗暗地召见了那几个博士，向他们仔细询问那颗星出现的时间，
